arts.ttl: France to align an all-PSG front three against Belgium
arts.sum: After missing out on the victory over Israel (4-1) in Budapest on Thursday, Marcus Thuram was expected to start for France against Belgium on Monday. That is now not likely…

arts.ttl: Why isn’t Kylian Mbappé playing for France against Belgium?
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappé is not part of France’s squad for their Nations League fixtures against Israel and Belgium after picking up a thigh injury in a recent domestic fixture. When will Kylian Mbappé return for Real Madrid?

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola asks Man City board for stunning €150m Chelsea transfer raid to replace Kevin De Bruyne
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola has reportedly asked the club to deliver the transfer of Chelsea star Cole Palmer as an ideal replacement for Kevin De Bruyne. De Bruyne has long been a star player for Man City, arguably becoming one of the best ever to play in the Premier League as well, but he’s […] The post Pep Guardiola asks Man City board for stunning €150m Chelsea transfer raid to replace Kevin De Bruyne appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Belgium Player Wears Kit Without Adidas Logo
arts.sum: In a rare and unusual occurrence, Leandro Trossard took to the pitch wearing Belgium's 2024 home kit without the Adidas logo during the second half of Belgium's UEFA Nations League clash against Italy, which ended in a 2-2 draw.

arts.ttl: Belgium vs France – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Belgium and France meet in the UEFA Nations League on Monday night, as the neighbours battle to reach the competition’s finals. The hosts are third in the group, with France sat second after recovering from defeat on matchday one to earn back-to-back wins. arts.sum: There is a lot of expectation on Michael Olise’s (22) shoulders. The playmaker, after impressing for Les Bleus in the Olympics, was brought into the senior side in September following his move…

arts.ttl: Belgium vs France: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Brussels plays host to the Flemish derby on Monday night as France take on Belgium in the Nations League. Matz Sels has pulled out of the squad with a knock, so Koen Casteels is expected to start on Monday night and Tedesco should retain the back three we saw against Italy on Thursday.
